title: seseli montanum f. polyphyllum
intro: Seseli montanum f. polyphyllum, also known as Alpine Seseli or Mountain Seseli, is a plant species that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Seseli montanum f. polyphyllum include its potential to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. Seseli montanum f. polyphyllum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
